productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Red TShirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Go cheesy with your over-worked brain with this T-shirt from peter england.
